_comment: Mock CRM for the AI support assistant — a stand-in for a real CRM/helpdesk. Users and their support tickets, jarvis-themed so the FAQ maps to real product setup. Loaded by time_server/crm.py; served over MCP (jarvis.get_ticket / get_user / list_user_tickets) and used by the /support endpoint.

users.name: Dana Ptak
users.environment: macOS, jarvis-cli against the Cloud Run MCP server

tickets.subject: Authorization not working
tickets.description: After you deployed the MCP server to Cloud Run, `mcp list` in the CLI shows '✗ jarvis: unauthorized' and POSTs to the server return HTTP 401. It worked locally before auth was enabled.

tickets.subject: RAG answers say 'I don't know' for everything
tickets.description: With `config set rag on` every question comes back as 'I don't know'. Retrieval hit-rate looks like 0%.

tickets.subject: Local model is very slow
tickets.description: Answers on the local Ollama provider take 30-60s each. Wondering whether to switch to the cloud for interactive use.
